---
name: Content Suggestion
about: Suggest improvements or additions to the content
title: '[CONTENT] '
labels: 'content'
assignees: ''
---

## Section/Topic

Which section does this relate to?

## Suggestion Type

- [ ] New topic to cover
- [ ] Improvement to existing content
- [ ] Correction (factual error)
- [ ] Outdated information
- [ ] Missing practical guidance
- [ ] Better example needed

## Description

Clear description of your suggestion.

## Additional Context

- Links to supporting resources (articles, papers, documentation)
- Real-world examples that illustrate the point
- Your experience with this topic

## Checklist

- [ ] I've checked that this isn't a duplicate of an existing issue
- [ ] This aligns with the guide's voice (practical, opinionated, evidence-based)
